message:
fix: apply summarizeTool to history replay on resume

historyToMessages was still using raw tc.Arguments JSON for the
description and had no Detail. Now uses summarizeTool so resumed
sessions get the same human-readable rendering as live tool calls.
Tool calls with a Detail (edit_file diffs, task_list changes, etc)
are auto-expanded on resume.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
